# Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for contributing to Voboost! Before your contribution can be accepted,
please read and agree to this CLA.

## What this CLA covers

By submitting a pull request, issue, or any other contribution to the Voboost
project, you agree to the following terms.

## 1. Grant of License

You grant the project maintainer (Vitaly Harisov) a perpetual, worldwide,
non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable license to:

- Use, copy, modify, and distribute your contribution as part of the Voboost
  project, under any license that the maintainer chooses — including the
  PolyForm Noncommercial License, commercial licenses, or any other license.

- Sub-license your contribution to third parties under any terms the maintainer
  sees fit, including under commercial license agreements.

## 2. Copyright

You retain ownership of the copyright in your contribution. This CLA grants
the maintainer a license to use your contribution — it does not transfer
ownership.

## 3. Origin and Rights

You represent that:

- Your contribution is your original work, or you have the right to submit it.
- Your contribution does not, to the best of your knowledge, infringe on any
  third party's intellectual property rights.
- You are legally entitled to grant the licenses in this CLA.

## 4. No Obligation

The maintainer has no obligation to accept or use your contribution. The
maintainer may remove or modify your contribution at any time, for any reason.

## 5. No Warranty

Your contribution is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind. You are
not liable for any damage or loss arising from the use of your contribution.

## How to agree

By submitting a contribution (pull request, commit, or patch), you confirm that
you have read and agree to this CLA.
